issue_title: Angular Router navigations should be (probably) triggered with navigateByUrl() function
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
Currently all side effects or `catchError` functions use `this.router.navigate()` function to redirect to one of the predefined routes
This works great but fails when users enter URL with query params.
(i.e http://example.com?foo=5&bar=10)

This actually is a known bug in A
test_description_zh: 在带有查询参数的 URL（例如 http://example.com?foo=5&bar=10）上完成 OIDC 认证回调后，观察页面是否能正确完成路由跳转到目标页面。
expected_result_zh: 当回调 URL 包含查询参数时，Angular 路由应能正确解析并导航到预期页面，不会因为查询参数导致路由导航失败或跳转到错误的页面。
